body.title: Granny: static bus-builders (Aider.0, DickSimnel.0) omit one_at_a_time — fan-out per cycle
body.description:
**Problem (exposed by the 2026-07-06 live Granny→aider handshake test):** Granny's one-at-a-time dispatch guard (`daemon.py` run_once: `if wcfg.get('one_at_a_time') and (target in dispatched_this_cycle or _is_busy): continue`) is GATED on the worker config carrying `one_at_a_time: true`. Neither `Aider.0` nor `DickSimnel.0` sets it in `config/granny.yaml` OR daemon `_default_config()` (self-announced workers default it to False via `_load_announced_workers`). So the guard is skipped for both static bus-builders: in one poll cycle Granny dispatched 3 Aider-tagged tickets into the `aider.0` mailbox at once (aider log: `fetch_unseen mailbox='aider.0' count=3`). The listener serializes them so it is not overload, but it (a) marks N tickets `dispatched` simultaneously — if the builder dies mid-queue the rest are stuck until the stale-dispatch watchdog fires, and (b) defeats the intended one-ticket-at-a-time handshake. Latent for DickSimnel (never run live); the aider bring-up exposed it.

**Proposed shape:** add `one_at_a_time: true` to `Aider.0` and `DickSimnel.0` in BOTH write-sites (config/granny.yaml + daemon `_default_config`, which must stay in sync — drift-debt). Both are synchronous one-at-a-time builders, so the flag is semantically correct.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/config/granny.yaml, unseen_university/devices/granny/daemon.py (_default_config). HIGH inertia (Granny dispatch — needs Akien pre-approval).
**Design rules:** yaml<->daemon fallback must stay in sync; homogeneity; handshake not spawn.
**Scope boundary:** just the one_at_a_time flag on the two static builders + its test. NOT load-balancing (T-granny-builder-load-balancing) and NOT the Aider tag-semantics collision (also T-granny-builder-load-balancing).
**Test plan:** red->green in tests/test_granny_rules_engine.py — with a builder available and >=2 dispatchable tickets routed to it, run_once dispatches AT MOST ONE per cycle (assert exactly one `dispatched` transition for that worker per cycle).
**Completion criteria:** the test above passes (fails before the flag, passes after) for both Aider.0 and DickSimnel.0.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Added one_at_a_time:true to Aider.0 + DickSimnel.0 in both write-sites (granny.yaml + _default_config). run_once now dispatches <=1 ticket per builder per cycle. Proven red->green: tests/test_granny_rules_engine.py::TestRunOnce::test_aider_tagged_one_at_a_time_prevents_mailbox_fanout (red=AssertionError@6bb37232, green@2b480730). Full granny suite 32 passed.
